visual_description: A young boy with light-colored hair, wearing a gray shirt, is seen in close-up, leaning forward and looking down at his hands. His hands are positioned near his face, and he appears to be holding or examining something small and dark. The background is dark and indistinct, with the boy’s face and hands being the primary focus of the shot.
